Simple Process

## How It Works

From search to move-in, we've made renting as simple and stress-free as possible.

01

### Search Available Rentals

Browse our current listings by city, price range, and bedroom count. Filter for pet-friendly units, short-term leases, and more.

02

### Schedule a Viewing

Found something you like? Book a tour online or give us a call. We offer same-day showings for most properties.

03

### Apply Online in Minutes

Our simple online application takes less than 10 minutes. Decisions within 24–48 hours. No unnecessary paperwork.

04

### Move In

Sign your lease digitally, pay your deposit, and get your keys. Our team is here to support you throughout your tenancy.

[Browse Available Rentals](/properties)

Why Hasker & Co.

## Good Homes.  
Fair Prices.  
No Surprises.

Everyone deserves a quality home they can actually afford. Hasker & Co. Realty Group cuts through the noise. No inflated prices, no hidden admin fees, no bait-and-switch listings. Just honest homes for real families.

### Prices You Can Trust

What you see is what you pay. We never inflate rents or add surprise move-in fees beyond the standard security deposit.

### 24-Hour Application Decisions

Apply online in under 10 minutes. Our team reviews every application and responds within 24 hours. No unnecessary waiting.

### Maintenance That Shows Up

Our maintenance team responds fast. When something needs fixing in your home, you won't be waiting weeks for a call back.

### Your Whole Family Welcome

Kids, pets, extended family. We work with you. Many of our homes are pet-friendly and we'll always be upfront about policies.

[Get in Touch](/contact)[Apply Now](/apply)

2,000+

Families successfully housed since 2012

Our Edge

## Built on Real Systems Expertise

Hasker & Co. Realty Group is led by an Information Systems specialist trained in database architecture, information security, and AI-driven workflows. That academic foundation shapes how we protect your data, match you to properties precisely, and move faster than traditional agencies.

Our technology infrastructure is built to the standards of academic Information Systems study at the university level — not retrofitted from off-the-shelf tools.

### Database Architecture

Secure, structured property and applicant data with no cross-contamination or data leaks.

### Information Security

Your personal details are encrypted end-to-end. We comply with U.S. data privacy standards.

### AI-Driven Matching

We use intelligent workflows to match applicants to available homes faster than manual review.

Real People, Real Help

# Meet Your Housing Specialists

Our team knows every neighbourhood, every price point, every shortcut. We work for families — not commissions — and we find affordable homes fast.

Our Approach

## Why Families Choose to Work With Us

There are thousands of real estate agents. Here's what makes working with ours different.

### No Commission Pressure

Our specialists are incentivized to find you the right fit — not the highest-margin unit. We succeed when you're genuinely happy with your home.

### Local Market Experts

Our team lives and works in the communities we serve. We know which blocks are quiet, which schools are top-rated, and where you can park.

### Licensed & Accountable

Every agent is fully licensed with the Virginia Real Estate Board and bound by the REALTOR® Code of Ethics.

### Multi-City Coverage

Whether you're relocating to Atlanta, Charlotte, Houston, or staying local in Virginia Beach — we have a specialist for your market.

Areas of Expertise

## We Specialize In What Matters to You

Not every housing search is the same. Our team is trained in the specific situations renters and buyers face most often.

### Affordable Rentals

Most Popular

Apartments and houses under $1,800/mo across all our markets. We specialize in quality units at honest prices.

### Family Homes

3+ bedroom homes near top-rated schools with safe neighbourhoods. We know the school district maps better than most principals.

### Corporate Relocation

Fast-tracked viewings, virtual tours, and guaranteed move-in timelines for employees relocating on company time.

### First-Time Renters

No Credit OK

No rental history? We work with first-time renters and help you build the documentation you need for approval.

### Section 8 / HCV

Several of our properties accept Housing Choice Vouchers. Our agents know exactly which listings are voucher-friendly.

### Pet-Friendly Homes

Over 40% of our listings accept pets. We filter your search by pet policy so you only see genuinely pet-welcoming options.

Common Questions

## Working With Our Agents

Do I need to pay an agent fee to use your services?

No. Our services are free for renters and buyers. We are compensated through a standard co-brokerage arrangement with the listing owner — you pay nothing out of pocket for working with our team.

Can I work with a specific agent I've spoken with before?

Absolutely. If you have an existing relationship with one of our specialists, just reference their name when you contact us and we'll make sure they handle your inquiry.

What areas do your agents cover?

Our main office is in Virginia Beach, VA with active coverage across Hampton Roads. We also help clients relocating to Atlanta, Charlotte, Houston, Dallas, Nashville, Phoenix, and other major markets through our partner network.

How quickly can an agent respond to my inquiry?

Our standard is within 24 hours on business days — usually much faster. For urgent moves or expiring application deadlines, call us directly and we'll prioritize your case.

Can your agents help with both renting and buying?

Yes. Most of our specialists handle both rental and purchase transactions. If you're undecided between renting and buying, your agent can walk you through the financial comparison for your specific situation.

![Beautiful sunlit living room in an affordable home](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D1000%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

Licensed REALTORS®

Join the Team

## Are You a Licensed Real Estate Agent?

We're always looking for motivated specialists who share our commitment to affordable housing. If you're licensed in Virginia or one of our target markets, we'd love to talk.

Now Hiring · Virginia Beach, VA

# Help Families Find a Place to Call Home

We're a Virginia Beach real estate team on a mission — affordable homes, honest prices, real people. If that's the work you want to do, we want to hear from you.

[View Open Roles](#open-roles) [careers@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com)

2,000+

Families Housed

12+

Cities Served

Since 2012

Building Trust

Why Join Us

## Work That Actually Matters

Housing is one of the most fundamental human needs. Every home we help someone find is a family with stability, safety, and a foundation to build from.

### People First

We measure success by how many families we house, not how many deals we close. Every decision starts with the question: does this help our tenants?

### Honest Always

No hidden fees, no jargon, no runaround. We treat every tenant the way we'd want to be treated — with transparency and respect.

### Grow With Us

We invest in our team's development. Whether it's a license sponsorship, a training stipend, or a clear promotion path, we want you to advance.

### Real Community

We're a small, tight-knit team. No corporate bureaucracy, no anonymous org chart. You'll know your colleagues and your impact.

Life at Hasker

## A Team You'll Be Proud to Be Part Of

Compensation & Perks

## We Invest in the People Who Invest in Others

*   Competitive compensation (salary or commission depending on role)
    
*   Health, dental, and vision insurance
    
*   Paid time off + holidays
    
*   Flexible / hybrid schedules for applicable roles
    
*   Real estate license sponsorship (exam fees covered)
    
*   Continuing education reimbursement
    
*   Company vehicle or mileage reimbursement for field roles
    
*   Monthly team lunches and quarterly outings
    

Now Hiring

## Open Positions

All roles are based in Virginia Beach, VA unless noted as hybrid or remote. Equal opportunity employer committed to a diverse, inclusive team.

SalesFull-Time

### Licensed Real Estate Agent

Virginia Beach, VA

Represent buyers and renters in finding their perfect affordable home. You'll manage client relationships from first inquiry through move-in, conduct property showings, and close transactions with integrity.

#### What You Bring

*   Active Virginia real estate license (or willing to obtain within 90 days)
*   Strong local market knowledge in Hampton Roads or willingness to learn
*   Excellent written and verbal communication skills
*   Self-motivated with ability to manage your own pipeline
*   CRM experience a plus

#### What You Get

*   Competitive commission splits
*   Health benefits after 90 days
*   Marketing support & leads provided
*   Flexible schedule

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Licensed%20Real%20Estate%20Agent>)

LeasingFull-Time

### Leasing Consultant

Virginia Beach, VA

Be the first impression for prospective tenants. You'll conduct showings, qualify applicants, process rental applications, and guide tenants through move-in. This role is perfect for a people-person who loves matching families with their next home.

#### What You Bring

*   1+ year of customer service, sales, or leasing experience
*   Strong interpersonal skills and patience
*   Basic proficiency with property management software (training provided)
*   Virginia driver's license and reliable transportation
*   Real estate license preferred but not required

#### What You Get

*   Base salary + leasing bonuses
*   Health & dental benefits
*   Paid time off
*   Real estate license sponsorship available

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Leasing%20Consultant>)

OperationsFull-Time

### Property Manager

Virginia Beach, VA

Oversee a portfolio of residential rental properties from day-to-day operations to tenant relations. You'll handle maintenance coordination, lease renewals, rent collection, and inspections while ensuring our tenants have a great experience.

#### What You Bring

*   3+ years in residential property management
*   Experience with lease administration and tenant relations
*   Familiarity with Virginia landlord-tenant law
*   Organized, detail-oriented, and calm under pressure
*   Virginia real estate license preferred

#### What You Get

*   Competitive salary
*   Performance bonuses
*   Company vehicle allowance
*   Full health benefits package

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Property%20Manager>)

MarketingFull-Time

### Marketing Coordinator

Virginia Beach, VA (Hybrid)

Drive our online presence and tenant acquisition through content, SEO, social media, and digital campaigns. You'll write property descriptions, manage our blog, create social content, and track what's working.

#### What You Bring

*   2+ years of digital marketing experience
*   Strong copywriting skills — you can write for real people, not robots
*   Experience with SEO fundamentals and content strategy
*   Proficiency with social media platforms and scheduling tools
*   Real estate or property management experience is a big plus

#### What You Get

*   Salary commensurate with experience
*   Remote flexibility
*   Health benefits
*   Creative autonomy

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Marketing%20Coordinator>)

MaintenanceFull-Time

### Maintenance Technician

Virginia Beach, VA

Keep our properties in top condition for the families who call them home. You'll handle work orders, preventive maintenance, unit turns, and emergency repairs across our residential portfolio.

#### What You Bring

*   3+ years of residential maintenance experience
*   Skills in plumbing, electrical, HVAC, and general carpentry
*   Ability to troubleshoot and resolve issues independently
*   Valid Virginia driver's license
*   EPA 608 certification preferred

#### What You Get

*   Competitive hourly rate + overtime
*   Company van & tools provided
*   Health benefits
*   On-call rotation with pay premium

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Maintenance%20Technician>)

OperationsFull-Time

### Tenant Relations Specialist

Virginia Beach, VA

Be the voice our tenants trust. You'll handle inbound tenant inquiries, coordinate maintenance requests, manage lease renewals, and resolve disputes with empathy and professionalism.

#### What You Bring

*   2+ years in a customer-facing role
*   Experience with conflict resolution
*   Comfortable working in a fast-paced, multi-tasking environment
*   Strong written communication — email and tenant portal responses
*   Property management software experience a plus

#### What You Get

*   Competitive salary
*   Monday–Friday schedule
*   Health benefits after 60 days
*   Paid training

[Apply for This Role](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=Application: Tenant%20Relations%20Specialist>)

Simple Process

## Three Steps to Joining Us

No portals, no 12-page forms. Send your resume and a short note about why you want to work with us — that's it. We keep hiring human.

01

### Send Your Resume

Email your resume and a brief note to careers@haskerrealtygroup.com. Put the role title in the subject line.

02

### Intro Call

We'll schedule a 20-minute call to learn about you, answer your questions, and tell you more about the role and culture.

03

### Interview & Offer

One or two interviews (depending on role) and a decision within the same week. We don't make you wait.

![Welcoming home exterior](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1570129477492-45c003edd2be%3Fw%3D1000%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

Ready?

### Let's Build Something Together

Whether you're a seasoned real estate professional or just starting out, we'd love to have a conversation. Send us your resume — no cover letter required.

[careers@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com)

213 Bob Ln, Virginia Beach, VA 23454

Mon – Fri, 9 AM – 6 PM EST

## Don't See the Right Role?

If you're passionate about affordable housing and want to be part of our team, send a general application. We keep strong resumes on file and reach out when new roles open.

[Send a General Application](<mailto:careers@haskerrealtygroup.com?subject=General Application>)

# URL: https://haskerrealtygroup.com/privacy

Legal

# Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2025

## 1\. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us when you submit an inquiry, rental application, or contact form. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and any details about your housing needs.

## 2\. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

*   Match you with available rental and for-sale properties
*   Respond to your inquiries and schedule viewings
*   Process rental applications
*   Send you updates about properties that match your criteria
*   Improve our services

## 3\. Information Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as necessary to process your application or as required by law.

## 4\. Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

## 5\. Cookies

Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings.

## 6\. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at [info@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:info@haskerrealtygroup.com).

## 7\. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:  
Hasker & Co. Realty Group  
1230 Peachtree Street NE, Suite 400, Atlanta, GA 30309  
[info@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:info@haskerrealtygroup.com)

---

# URL: https://haskerrealtygroup.com/terms

Legal

# Terms of Service

Last updated: January 1, 2025

## 1\. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using the Hasker & Co. Realty Group website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

## 2\. Use of Services

Our services are intended to help individuals find affordable rental and for-sale properties. You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

## 3\. Property Listings

We strive to ensure that all property listings are accurate and up to date. However, availability and pricing are subject to change. All listings are subject to prior rental or sale.

## 4\. Application Process

Submitting a rental application does not guarantee approval. Applications are reviewed on a case-by-case basis. We reserve the right to decline applications in accordance with fair housing laws.

## 5\. Fair Housing

Hasker & Co. Realty Group is committed to fair housing. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, or disability.

## 6\. Limitation of Liability

Hasker & Co. Realty Group shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

## 7\. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

## 8\. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at [info@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:info@haskerrealtygroup.com).

---

# URL: https://haskerrealtygroup.com/accessibility

Commitment

# Accessibility

We are committed to making our website accessible to everyone.

## Our Commitment

Hasker & Co. Realty Group is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.

## Conformance Status

We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities.

## Technical Specifications

Our website relies on the following technologies for conformance:

*   HTML
*   CSS
*   JavaScript

## Known Limitations

We are actively working to identify and resolve any accessibility barriers. If you encounter any issues, please contact us so we can address them promptly.

## Feedback & Contact

We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of our website. If you experience any barriers or need assistance, please contact us:

*   Email: [info@haskerrealtygroup.com](mailto:info@haskerrealtygroup.com)
*   Address: 1230 Peachtree Street NE, Suite 400, Atlanta, GA 30309

We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 2 business days.

---

Market Guide

## Renting in Atlanta

Atlanta is one of the most affordable major cities in the US for renters. With a thriving job market anchored by Fortune 500 headquarters, world-class dining, and neighborhoods ranging from the historic charm of Grant Park to the modern energy of Midtown, Atlanta offers something for every budget.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group maintains a curated inventory of affordable rental homes and apartments across Atlanta's most desirable neighborhoods — including Buckhead, East Atlanta Village, Decatur, Sandy Springs, and Marietta. Our listings start from around $950/month for one-bedroom apartments, with family-sized homes available from $1,400/month.

Atlanta's cost of living is approximately 5% below the national average, making it an ideal destination for families, young professionals, and anyone relocating to the Southeast. With MARTA public transit, Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport, and a rapidly expanding BeltLine trail system, Atlanta combines big-city amenities with Southern affordability.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Atlanta Listings](/properties?q=Atlanta)

![Affordable home interior — Atlanta](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

$1,150

Avg. Monthly Rent

$0

Hidden Fees

Common Questions

## Renting in Atlanta — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Atlanta?

The average rent in Atlanta starts around $1,150/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Atlanta?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Atlanta?

Yes. Several of our Atlanta listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Atlanta?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

Explore More

Market Guide

## Renting in Charlotte

Charlotte is one of the fastest-growing cities in the United States, yet it remains one of the most affordable major metros on the East Coast. As the second-largest banking center in the US, Charlotte offers strong employment opportunities alongside a lower cost of living than comparable cities.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group serves the greater Charlotte area with affordable rentals in neighborhoods like South End, NoDa, Plaza Midwood, University City, and Ballantyne. Studio apartments start from around $850/month, and family homes are available from $1,300/month.

Charlotte's combination of mild climate, excellent schools, professional sports teams, and proximity to both the Blue Ridge Mountains and Atlantic beaches makes it a top relocation destination. The LYNX light rail connects key neighborhoods, and the cost of living sits about 4% below the national average.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Charlotte Listings](/properties?q=Charlotte)

![Affordable home interior — Charlotte](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

Common Questions

## Renting in Charlotte — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Charlotte?

The average rent in Charlotte starts around $1,100/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Charlotte?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Charlotte?

Yes. Several of our Charlotte listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Charlotte?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

[View All Houston Listings](/properties?q=Houston)

Market Guide

## Renting in Houston

Houston offers one of the largest supplies of affordable rental housing among major US cities. With no state income tax, a diverse economy spanning energy, healthcare, aerospace, and technology, and a cost of living well below coastal metros, Houston is a top choice for budget-conscious renters.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group maintains extensive listings across Houston's sprawling metro — from the cultural richness of Montrose and the Heights to family-friendly suburbs like Katy, Sugar Land, and Pearland. One-bedroom apartments start from around $900/month, with spacious family homes from $1,350/month.

Houston's lack of zoning laws creates a unique rental market with diverse housing options at every price point. The Texas Medical Center, NASA's Johnson Space Center, and the Port of Houston drive steady employment, while the city's world-renowned food scene and 640+ parks provide quality of life that rivals cities twice the cost.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Houston Listings](/properties?q=Houston)

![Affordable home interior — Houston](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

$1,050

Avg. Monthly Rent

24 hr

## Renting in Houston — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Houston?

The average rent in Houston starts around $1,050/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Houston?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Houston?

Yes. Several of our Houston listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Houston?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

Market Guide

## Renting in Dallas

The Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex is the fourth-largest metro area in the United States and one of the most affordable. With no state income tax, a booming technology sector, and corporate headquarters for AT&T, Southwest Airlines, and dozens of Fortune 500 companies, Dallas offers exceptional economic opportunity at a fraction of coastal city prices.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group serves the greater Dallas area including Uptown, Deep Ellum, Oak Lawn, Plano, Frisco, and Arlington. Apartments start from around $950/month, and family homes are available from $1,400/month across the metroplex.

Dallas combines a thriving arts and dining scene with family-friendly suburbs, excellent highway connectivity, and DART public transit. The cost of living is approximately 2% below the national average, and the rental market offers a wide range of options from modern downtown lofts to suburban single-family homes.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Dallas Listings](/properties?q=Dallas)

![Affordable home interior — Dallas](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

Hidden Fees

Common Questions

## Renting in Dallas — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Dallas?

The average rent in Dallas starts around $1,100/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Dallas?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Dallas?

Yes. Several of our Dallas listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Dallas?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

Explore More

[View All Nashville Listings](/properties?q=Nashville)

Market Guide

## Renting in Nashville

Nashville has experienced tremendous growth over the past decade, yet affordable rental options remain available throughout the metro — particularly in neighborhoods just outside the downtown core. With no state income tax on wages, a booming healthcare and music industry, and a vibrant cultural scene, Nashville attracts renters from across the country.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals across Nashville including East Nashville, Germantown, Berry Hill, Antioch, and Murfreesboro. One-bedroom apartments are available from around $1,000/month, and family homes start from $1,450/month.

Nashville's economy is anchored by healthcare giants like HCA and Vanderbilt, a thriving music and entertainment industry, and a rapidly growing tech sector. The city's walkable neighborhoods, excellent food scene, and strong sense of community make it an increasingly popular choice for families and young professionals seeking affordable Southern living.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Nashville Listings](/properties?q=Nashville)

Hidden Fees

Common Questions

## Renting in Nashville — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Nashville?

The average rent in Nashville starts around $1,200/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Nashville?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Nashville?

Yes. Several of our Nashville listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Nashville?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

[View All Phoenix Listings](/properties?q=Phoenix)

Market Guide

## Renting in Phoenix

Phoenix is the fifth-largest city in the United States and one of the most affordable major metros in the Sun Belt. With over 300 days of sunshine per year, a growing technology and healthcare sector, and rental prices significantly below California and Pacific Northwest competitors, Phoenix is ideal for budget-conscious renters seeking warm-weather living.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group serves the greater Phoenix metro including Scottsdale, Tempe, Mesa, Chandler, Gilbert, and Glendale. Apartments start from around $950/month, with family homes available from $1,400/month across the Valley.

Phoenix's cost of living is approximately 3% below the national average, with particular savings in housing. The metro's extensive freeway system, growing light rail network, and proximity to outdoor recreation — from Camelback Mountain to Sedona day trips — provide a quality of life that makes Phoenix one of the fastest-growing cities in America.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Phoenix Listings](/properties?q=Phoenix)

![Affordable home interior — Phoenix](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

$1,100

Hidden Fees

Common Questions

## Renting in Phoenix — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Phoenix?

The average rent in Phoenix starts around $1,100/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Phoenix?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Phoenix?

Yes. Several of our Phoenix listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Phoenix?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

[View All Austin Listings](/properties?q=Austin)

Market Guide

## Renting in Austin

Austin is a top-tier technology hub with a cost of living that remains well below Silicon Valley, Seattle, or New York. While central Austin has seen price increases, affordable rental options are abundant in surrounding areas — and Hasker & Co. Realty Group specializes in finding them.

Our Austin-area listings span neighborhoods like East Austin, Mueller, Pflugerville, Round Rock, Cedar Park, and Kyle. One-bedroom apartments start from around $1,050/month, and family homes are available from $1,500/month.

Austin's economy is powered by major employers including Tesla, Apple, Google, Dell, and the University of Texas. Combined with no state income tax, a world-famous live music scene, excellent outdoor recreation along Lady Bird Lake and the Barton Creek Greenbelt, and consistently mild winters, Austin offers an exceptional quality-to-cost ratio for renters willing to explore beyond the downtown core.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Austin Listings](/properties?q=Austin)

$1,250

Common Questions

## Renting in Austin — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Austin?

The average rent in Austin starts around $1,250/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Austin?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Austin?

Yes. Several of our Austin listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Austin?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

[View All Miami Listings](/properties?q=Miami)

Market Guide

## Renting in Miami

Miami is known for its beaches, international culture, and vibrant nightlife — but it also has pockets of genuinely affordable housing throughout the greater metro area. With no state income tax, a growing tech and finance sector, and year-round tropical weather, Miami attracts renters from across the globe.

Hasker & Co. Realty Group focuses on affordable Miami-area rentals in neighborhoods like Little Havana, Hialeah, Kendall, Homestead, North Miami, and Doral. One-bedroom apartments start from around $1,100/month, and family homes are available from $1,600/month.

While South Beach and Brickell command premium prices, the greater Miami metro offers a wide range of budget-friendly options with easy access to the beach, diverse cuisine, and a thriving cultural scene. Miami's Metrorail and Metrobus systems connect affordable neighborhoods to employment centers, making it possible to enjoy Miami living without Miami Beach prices.

[Apply in 10 Minutes](/apply)[Browse Miami Listings](/properties?q=Miami)

![Affordable home interior — Miami](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.unsplash.com%2Fphoto-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c%3Fw%3D900%26q%3D80&w=3840&q=75)

$1,350

Avg. Monthly Rent

Common Questions

## Renting in Miami — FAQ

How much does it cost to rent a home in Miami?

The average rent in Miami starts around $1,350/month. Hasker & Co. Realty Group offers affordable rentals with no hidden fees and transparent pricing on every listing.

How do I apply for a rental in Miami?

Apply online at haskerrealtygroup.com/apply in under 10 minutes. We review every application within 24 hours. No paper forms, no runaround.

Does Hasker & Co. have pet-friendly rentals in Miami?

Yes. Several of our Miami listings are pet-friendly. Pet policies are disclosed upfront on every listing so you never waste time on a home that won't accept your pet.

Are there any hidden fees when renting through Hasker & Co. in Miami?

No. The price listed is the price you pay. Standard upfront costs are a security deposit (typically 1–2 months rent) and the first month's rent. All fees are shown before you apply.

## Affordable Rentals in Other Cities
